sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Kyivstar Group Completes US$150.9 Million Secondary Offering of Common Shares
feed.summary: Kyivstar Group Ltd. has completed a US$150.9 million secondary offering of common shares, with Sidley Austin LLP advising Kyivstar Group Ltd. and VEON Amsterdam B.V., and Latham & Watkins advising the underwriters. The article lists numerous individuals from various firms tagged in relation to this transaction. Full access to the content requires a standard 1-year membership.

feed.title: Genius Sports Limited $GENI is Hodges Capital Management Inc.'s 10th Largest Position
feed.summary: Hodges Capital Management Inc. significantly increased its stake in Genius Sports Limited ($GENI) by 91.0%, making it the firm's 10th largest holding. Other institutional investors like JPMorgan Chase & Co. and Oppenheimer & Co. Inc. also raised their positions, contributing to 81.91% institutional ownership. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for GENI with an average price target of $14.10, contrasting with its recent share price of $5.80.

feed.title: CenterBook Partners LP Buys Shares of 17,659 S&P Global Inc. $SPGI
feed.summary: CenterBook Partners LP has acquired 17,659 shares of S&P Global Inc. (NYSE:SPGI) in Q3, valued at approximately $8.595 million, contributing to institutional ownership of 87.17%. S&P Global recently reported Q3 earnings, slightly missing analyst consensus, with revenue up 9% and raised its quarterly dividend to $0.97 per share. Analysts have issued various ratings and price targets for SPGI, with an average rating of "Buy" and an average price target of $566.33.

feed.title: Here's Why Gator Capital Sold PayPal (PYPL)
feed.summary: Gator Capital Management sold its position in PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL) during Q4 2025, after management discussions indicated continued business challenges. Despite PayPal's revenue growth, the investment firm decided to step aside and monitor future earnings reports. This decision aligns with observations from Carillon Eagle Small Cap Growth Fund, which also exited its PayPal position due to performance issues.

feed.title: Fiverr stock price is collapsing today as the freelancer platform tries to put a positive spin on AI disruption
feed.summary: Fiverr International Ltd. (NYSE: FVRR) shares are significantly down after the company released its Q4 2025 financial results. Despite modest revenue growth, the negative 2026 outlook and a substantial decline in annual active buyers have caused investor concern, even as Fiverr executives attempt to frame AI disruption positively. Revenue saw a 3.4% increase to $107.2 million, but marketplace revenue decreased by 2.7%, and active buyers dropped by 13.6% year-over-year.

feed.title: TD Cowen Adjusts Teledyne Technologies PT to $750 From $650, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: TD Cowen has raised its price target for Teledyne Technologies (TDY) to $750 from $650, while reaffirming a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook on the electronic equipment and parts company. Teledyne Technologies specializes in digital imaging, test and measurement instruments, aerospace and defense electronics, and engineering systems.

feed.title: Apple, Ulta Beauty, AstraZeneca And A Real Estate Stock On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
feed.summary: Experts on CNBC's "Halftime Report Final Trades" discussed their current stock picks. Joshua Brown remains positive on Apple, Jim Lebenthal favors AstraZeneca, Jenny Van Leeuwen Harrington highlighted VICI Properties for its dividend yield, and Joe Terranova recommended Ulta Beauty, which recently announced its first store opening in the UAE.

feed.title: La Rosa Holdings acquires remaining stake in Prestige brokerage
feed.summary: La Rosa Holdings Corp. has acquired the remaining 49% ownership in La Rosa Realty Prestige, making the Lakeland-based real estate brokerage a wholly owned subsidiary. This acquisition aligns with La Rosa Holdings' growth strategy, adding a profitable and market-leading operation that contributed $5.1 million in revenue. The company has also recently reported 14% revenue growth for fiscal year 2025 and is expanding into Europe.

feed.title: Incyte (INCY) Expands Latin American Partnership with Knight The
feed.summary: Incyte (INCY) has expanded its partnership with Knight Therapeutics to distribute additional therapeutic drugs, including retifanlimab and axatilimab, in Latin America. Knight's Brazilian affiliate is also seeking marketing authorization for NIKTIMVO. Incyte demonstrates strong financial health with robust profitability and liquidity, though recent insider selling warrants attention.

feed.title: Humana commits $1.7 million for Illinois health programs
feed.summary: Humana Inc. announced $1.7 million in grants to bolster health initiatives across Illinois, primarily targeting housing stability, workforce development, and healthcare access. This investment expands Humana's total commitment in Illinois to over $3 million, funding programs that address maternal and behavioral healthcare services and aim to reduce health disparities. Six organizations received funding in 2026 to implement these crucial community health programs.

feed.title: Brown & Brown acquires American Adventure Insurance
feed.summary: Brown & Brown's Dealer Services division has acquired American Adventure Insurance, a provider of dealership-embedded insurance and F&I products for various vehicles and commercial insurance solutions. Founder Paul Bender and his team will join Brown & Brown Dealer Services, with both parties expressing enthusiasm for the new partnership and anticipated growth. The acquisition aims to expand Brown & Brown's capabilities and offer innovative solutions to its nationwide network of dealerships.

feed.title: Fastenal Is Up 20% Year to Date. Here’s How Much the Stock Could Rise in 2026
feed.summary: Fastenal Company's stock has risen 20% year-to-date, trading near $46 per share, following strong fourth-quarter and record full-year 2025 results. The company achieved double-digit Q4 sales growth and record annual revenue, primarily driven by digital integration and key account expansion, with management anticipating double-digit net sales growth in 2026. A valuation model suggests a target price of $54, implying a 17% upside, based on projected revenue growth, operating margins, and continued market share gains.

feed.title: What State Street (STT)'s New Prime Money Market ETF and Mariner Deal Mean For Shareholders
feed.summary: State Street Corporation recently announced two key developments: Mariner's adoption of Charles River's Wealth Management Solution and the launch of the State Street Prime Money Market ETF (MMK). While Mariner's move aims to scale its advisor base, the MMK ETF is particularly significant as it expands State Street's cash franchise by offering ETF-based access to short-term debt with an 18 bps fee. These initiatives are directionally positive for State Street's fee mix and competitive positioning, though their individual impact on the company's long-term financial narrative and potential fee compression pressures remains to be fully seen.

feed.title: Invesco Canada announces changes to sub-advisor for certain Canadian-listed ETFs
feed.summary: Invesco Canada Ltd. announced changes to the sub-advisor for several of its Canadian-listed ESG ETFs following its agreement to sell its Canadian funds business to CI Investments Inc. While Invesco Capital Management LLC will continue as the discretionary sub-advisor until the closing, CI Global Asset Management will then assume full investment responsibility. The departure of NEI as the non-discretionary ESG sub-advisor will not alter the investment objectives or strategies of the affected ETFs.

feed.title: First National Bank of Omaha Buys Shares of 91,972 The TJX Companies, Inc. $TJX
feed.summary: First National Bank of Omaha acquired 91,972 shares of The TJX Companies, Inc. (NYSE:TJX) in Q3, making it their 23rd-largest holding. TJX beat Q3 earnings and revenue estimates, and analysts have a largely bullish outlook with an average target price of $163.86. Despite insider selling by CEO Ernie Herrman and Director Amy B. Lane, institutional investors hold 91.09% of the stock.

feed.title: Charles Schwab Foundation grants $1.5 million to Junior Achievement USA
feed.summary: The Charles Schwab Foundation has committed a three-year, $1.5 million grant to Junior Achievement USA (JA) to expand its Experiential Learning Centers nationwide. This funding will support the opening of up to six new centers annually, enhance student learning with AI tools, and increase volunteer engagement. The grant continues a decades-long partnership between Schwab and JA, aiming to equip young people with crucial financial literacy and career skills.

feed.title: Citigroup says signed and closed the sale of AO Citibank, Citi's former Russian subsidiary, to Renaissance Capital
feed.summary: Citigroup announced the completion of the sale of its former Russian subsidiary, AO Citibank, to Renaissance Capital. The investment banking giant confirmed that the deal has been signed and closed. This move finalizes Citigroup's exit from its Russian operations.

feed.title: Citigroup Completes Sale of Russian Subsidiary AO Citibank
feed.summary: Citigroup has completed the sale of its Russian subsidiary, AO Citibank, to Renaissance Capital, marking its full exit from the country. The transaction, which was approved by regulators and announced on February 18th, is expected to be neutral to Citi's capital despite a $1.6 billion currency loss previously reported. The bank anticipates a $4 billion rise in capital in Q1 2026 due to the transfer of risk-weighted assets.

feed.title: NXP leases big NW Austin office park as it aims to sell longtime HQ
feed.summary: NXP, a semiconductor company, is leasing a large office park in northwest Austin. This move comes as the company plans to sell its long-time headquarters in Oak Hill, demonstrating a need to modernize and create a more vibrant work environment for its employees.

feed.title: Truist Adjusts Price Target on Caesars Entertainment to $29 From $30, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Truist has lowered its price target for Caesars Entertainment (CZR) from $30 to $29, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes after Caesars Entertainment reported its Q4 2025 earnings, which saw the company swing to a loss despite a rise in revenue. Another firm, Deutsche Bank, also adjusted its price target for Caesars to $35 from $36, maintaining a Buy rating.

feed.title: Argus Adjusts Price Target on Wynn Resorts to $135 From $150, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Argus has adjusted its price target for Wynn Resorts (WYNN) from $150 to $135, while maintaining a 'Buy' rating on the stock. This news follows several other analysts who have also recently revised their price targets for Wynn Resorts, indicating a collective re-evaluation of the company's valuation. Despite the reduced price target, the continued 'Buy' rating suggests ongoing confidence in the company's prospects.

feed.title: Federal Realty Investment Trust: A DC-Area Retail REIT With So Much Winning (NYSE:FRT)
feed.summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) receives a "buy" rating due to strong leasing activity, high occupancy rates, and a robust FFO growth outlook. The company demonstrates a resilient dividend performance with ample coverage, although its debt-to-equity ratio is higher than peers. While the immediate upside may be muted, technical patterns suggest a bullish outlook for the stock.

feed.title: What Are Wall Street Analysts' Target Price for KLA Corporation Stock?
feed.summary: KLA Corporation (KLAC) has seen its stock soar over the past year due to strong fundamentals and investments in AI infrastructure, outperforming the S&P 500 and its sector. Despite a recent drop after Q2 2026 results due to component shortages, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating, with a mean price target of $1,703.44, indicating a 15.9% upside. This bullish sentiment is driven by expectations of an upcycle in wafer fab equipment and alignment with peer industry commentary.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson Says Head and Neck Cancer Treatment Given US FDA 'Breakthrough Therapy Designation'
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson announced that its head and neck cancer treatment has received 'Breakthrough Therapy Designation' from the U.S. FDA. This designation aims to expedite the development and review of drugs for serious or life-threatening conditions. The news was reported by MT Newswires.

feed.title: Essex Financial Services Inc. Reduces Position in Bank of America Corporation $BAC
feed.summary: Essex Financial Services Inc. recently reduced its position in Bank of America Corporation by 8.3%, selling 10,538 shares and retaining 117,042 shares valued at approximately $6.04 million. Despite this reduction, other institutional investors have increased their stakes, bringing total institutional ownership to 70.71%. Bank of America reported strong quarterly earnings, beating EPS estimates, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price of $60.30.

feed.title: Condor Capital Management Has $3.47 Million Holdings in Simon Property Group, Inc. $SPG
feed.summary: Condor Capital Management reduced its stake in Simon Property Group (SPG) by 32.9% in Q3, now holding 18,501 shares valued at $3.47 million. Simon Property Group exceeded Q3 earnings and revenue estimates, set strong FY2026 guidance, and announced a quarterly dividend of $2.20 per share alongside a $2.0 billion share buyback program. Institutional investors and hedge funds own 93.01% of the stock, and analysts currently have a "Hold" rating on the company.

feed.title: Cercano Management LLC Sells 43,313 Shares of S&P Global Inc. $SPGI
feed.summary: Cercano Management LLC has significantly reduced its stake in S&P Global Inc., selling 43,313 shares, which represents a 45.4% decrease and leaves them with 52,035 shares valued at approximately $25.33 million. Despite several analysts cutting their price targets for SPGI, the consensus rating remains a "Buy" with an average target price of $566.33. S&P Global recently reported a slight miss on quarterly EPS but saw revenue increase by 9% year-over-year, and has raised its quarterly dividend to $0.97 per share.

feed.title: Moody's Q4 Earnings Exceed Expectations
feed.summary: Moody's reported strong Q4 earnings, with non-GAAP EPS of $3.64 and revenue of $1.89 billion, both surpassing analyst expectations. The company experienced significant growth across its Decision Solutions, Research and Insights, and Data & Information segments. Analysts like Stifel and BofA have optimistic outlooks, with BofA initiating coverage with a Buy rating and a $550 price target, reflecting confidence in Moody's future growth potential.

feed.title: Arista shares fall as Meta–Nvidia deal revives networking competition concerns
feed.summary: Arista Networks shares dropped in premarket trading after Meta Platforms and Nvidia announced an expanded partnership for AI-optimized data centers, which includes Nvidia’s Spectrum-X Ethernet networking platform. This news, while not new to analysts, reignited concerns about competitive pressure for Arista in hyperscale data centers, given Nvidia's integrated networking strategy. Despite the market reaction, analysts from Wolfe Research and Morgan Stanley stated that the information was already known and incorporated into their assessments, with Arista still being Meta's sole supplier for certain data-center switching components.

feed.title: Kraft Heinz Announces Leadership Change in North America
feed.summary: Kraft Heinz announced that Pedro Navio, Executive Vice President and President for North America, will step down effective February 22, 2026, remaining as an advisor until March 6, 2026. This leadership change could significantly impact the company's operational and strategic priorities in its largest market. Analysts currently rate KHC stock as a Sell with a $23.00 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates it Neutral due to financial deterioration offset by strong cash generation.

feed.title: Walmart, Dollar Stores Beat Traditional Grocers' Reach As Affordability Crunch Intensifies, Report Finds
feed.summary: A new report by dunnhumby indicates that mass-market retailers like Walmart and dollar stores are gaining market share from traditional grocers as consumers face tighter budgets. Walmart's customer penetration has reached 72% of U.S. households, and dollar stores now surpass warehouse clubs in visits. This shift is driven by affordability concerns, with many households experiencing financial strain and perceiving higher inflation than official data suggests.

feed.title: Global Payments Inc (NYSE:GPN) Posts Mixed Q4 Results, Issues Strong 2026 Outlook
feed.summary: Global Payments Inc. (NYSE:GPN) reported mixed Q4 2025 results, with adjusted EPS narrowly beating estimates but revenue falling slightly short. The company provided a strong 2026 outlook, projecting double-digit earnings growth and affirming a commitment to return $7.5 billion to shareholders by 2027. This guidance suggests a positive long-term trajectory following its recent strategic transformations, including the acquisition of Worldpay and the divestiture of its Issuer Solutions business.

feed.title: Moody's Corp (NYSE:MCO) Beats Q4 Earnings Estimates, Provides 2026 Outlook
feed.summary: Moody's Corporation (NYSE:MCO) reported stronger-than-anticipated Q4 2025 results, surpassing revenue and EPS estimates with $1.89 billion in revenue and $3.64 adjusted EPS. The market reacted positively, with a pre-market stock gain of approximately 2.7%, countering a recent 21% decline. The company also provided its initial financial outlook for the full 2026 fiscal year, which will be a key discussion point during its earnings conference call.

feed.title: Piper Sandler Has Lowered Expectations for General Mills (NYSE:GIS) Stock Price
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has cut its price target for General Mills (NYSE:GIS) from $60.00 to $53.00, though it maintains an "overweight" rating, anticipating an almost 18% upside. The revision follows General Mills' lowered FY-2026 guidance, projecting a 1.5%–2% organic net sales decline and trimming EPS estimates. This news led to a 7.1% drop in shares, with the stock currently trading near $44.93, while the broader analyst consensus remains a "Hold" with an average price target of $52.56.

feed.title: New Jersey Data Analytics Firm Verisk Exceeds Q4 Profit Expectations
feed.summary: Verisk, a New Jersey-based insurance data analytics firm, exceeded Wall Street's fourth-quarter profit estimates, causing its shares to jump despite challenges like reduced weather activity and a smaller federal contract. The company's strong performance is attributed to consistent demand for its data-driven solutions in the insurance industry. Verisk also announced an expanded $2.5 billion share buyback program, though its 2026 projections for adjusted earnings per share and revenue are slightly below analyst expectations.

feed.title: Medical Device Company Exceeds Expectations with Insulin Pump Sales Growth
feed.summary: Insulet Corporation, a medical technology company, exceeded Wall Street expectations in the fourth quarter due to strong sales of its tubeless insulin delivery devices, particularly the Omnipod 5 system. The company reported a 31% revenue increase, achieved $781.8 million in Omnipod sales, and announced a $350 million boost to its stock repurchase program. Insulet projects significant revenue and adjusted per-share profit growth for 2026, signaling a positive outlook for investors.

feed.title: Piper Sandler raises Amgen stock price target on drug pipeline
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has increased its price target for Amgen (NASDAQ: AMGN) shares from $381 to $432, reiterating an Overweight rating. This decision follows a fireside chat with Amgen senior management, discussing the expansion of Uplizna and the progress of AMG 104, along with positive Phase II results for daxdilimab and the Phase III program for dazodalibep. The revised target also incorporates updated modeling following Amgen's strong fourth-quarter 2025 results, which showed nearly 10% revenue growth and higher sales estimates for key drugs.

feed.title: Verisk Analytics Inc (NASDAQ:VRSK) Reports Q4 Earnings Beat but Stock Plummets on Weak Revenue Outlook
feed.summary: Verisk Analytics (NASDAQ:VRSK) reported a mixed financial performance for Q4 2025, with adjusted EPS exceeding estimates but revenue falling short. The market reacted negatively, leading to a stock plummet due to a conservative full-year 2026 revenue outlook despite strong profitability, cash generation, and increased shareholder returns. The company's focus on AI and strategic portfolio adjustments will be key in navigating future stock performance.

feed.title: What Textron (TXT)'s New Buyback and Level D Simulator Milestone Means For Shareholders
feed.summary: Textron Inc. (TXT) recently announced a new share repurchase program for up to 25 million shares with no expiration date, aimed at offsetting dilution and for capital management. Additionally, its affiliate TRU Simulation + Training secured FAA Level D certification for its Cessna Citation Ascend full flight simulator, signaling a strategic move into advanced aviation training. While these developments support Textron's broader investment narrative, the article emphasizes that the core challenges around margins and product mix in its industrial and aviation segments remain crucial for investors to monitor.

feed.title: Best Bank Stock to Buy 2026: Top Banking Investments & Analysis
feed.summary: The banking sector is poised for robust growth in 2026 due to the Federal Reserve's easing cycle, regulatory relief, and improving capital markets. JPMorgan Chase is highlighted as the top large-cap investment for its market dominance, strong risk management, and technology investments. Other strong contenders include Bank of America for its resilience, Wells Fargo for its turnaround potential, U.S. Bancorp for quality at a discount, and select regional banks offering attractive alternatives.

feed.title: RBC Capital Adjusts Price Target on Leidos Holdings to $215 From $230, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: RBC Capital has adjusted its price target for Leidos Holdings (LDOS) to $215, down from $230, while reiterating an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This update follows a series of other analyst adjustments to Leidos' target price, reflecting recent company news and performance. Leidos Holdings also recently reported its Q4 and full-year 2025 results, with fiscal Q4 adjusted earnings rising but revenue falling, and provided guidance for fiscal year 2026.

feed.title: What's Going On With Wix Stock Wednesday? - Intuit (NASDAQ:INTU), Wix.com (NASDAQ:WIX)
feed.summary: Wix.com and Intuit Inc. have expanded their partnership to provide a more integrated experience for small businesses. This collaboration allows Wix users to access QuickBooks directly for financial management and operational streamlining, including automated accounting and connecting CRM data with Mailchimp. QuickBooks customers will also benefit by being able to launch tailored Wix websites pre-populated with their existing business information, enhancing their online presence and marketing efforts.

feed.title: Insulet (NASDAQ:PODD) Surprises With Q4 CY2025 Sales
feed.summary: Insulet (NASDAQ:PODD) reported strong Q4 CY2025 results, with sales of $783.8 million exceeding analyst expectations by 2% and non-GAAP EPS of $1.55 beating estimates by 6%. The company's revenue grew 31.2% year-on-year, and it provided Q1 CY2026 revenue guidance largely in line with analyst predictions. Insulet emphasized its robust business model and disciplined execution as key drivers for its continued success in revolutionizing diabetes care.

feed.title: Moody's (NYSE:MCO) Surprises With Q4 CY2025 Sales
feed.summary: Moody's (NYSE:MCO) exceeded Wall Street's expectations for Q4 CY2025, reporting revenue of $1.89 billion, up 13% year-on-year, and a non-GAAP profit of $3.64 per share. The company also provided optimistic adjusted EPS guidance for the upcoming financial year 2026. This performance led to a positive reaction in its stock price immediately after the results were released.

feed.title: Kite Realty Group Trust (NYSE:KRG) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Kite Realty Group Trust (NYSE: KRG) held its Q4 2025 earnings call, reporting strong operational and transactional accomplishments including leasing nearly 5 million square feet, entering into joint ventures worth $1 billion, and selling $622 million in noncore assets. The company exceeded earnings expectations with an EPS of $0.843 against an anticipated $0.51, and discussed its strategy to enhance portfolio quality, organic growth, and shareholder value through strategic dispositions, acquisitions, and share buybacks. They also provided guidance for 2026, anticipating slight FFO per share growth and continued focus on derisking the portfolio and improving embedded rent escalators.

feed.title: Caesars Entertainment, Inc. (NASDAQ:CZR) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Caesars Entertainment, Inc. (CZR) reported its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings, with consolidated net revenues of $2.9 billion for the quarter, up 4% year-over-year. Despite missing EPS expectations, the company highlighted solid full-year results driven by portfolio diversity and omnichannel focus. Key discussions included the performance of Las Vegas and Regional segments, the strong growth of the Digital segment, and strategies for debt reduction and share repurchases.

feed.title: Allegion plc (NYSE:ALLE) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Allegion plc reported its Q4 2025 earnings, with revenue exceeding $1 billion, an increase of 9.3% year-over-year, and organic revenue up 3.3%. The company's Americas nonresidential business was a strong driver of growth, while the U.S. residential market was softer than anticipated. Allegion is initiating fiscal year 2026 adjusted EPS guidance of $8.70 to $8.90 per share, anticipating continued growth led by Americas nonresidential and electronics businesses.

feed.title: Starbucks: Dividend at a Crossroads as Turnaround Unfolds
feed.summary: Starbucks, a long-time dividend investor favorite with a 15-year streak of annual dividend increases, is facing challenges to its dividend sustainability. The company's payout ratio now exceeds 200%, cash flows are declining, and dividend growth has significantly slowed. While CEO Brian Niccol's "Back to Starbucks" turnaround strategy is underway, income investors are cautioned about the near-term risks to the dividend given the current financial strain.

feed.title: Drucker Wealth 3.0 LLC Boosts Stake in Cummins Inc. $CMI
feed.summary: Drucker Wealth 3.0 LLC significantly increased its stake in Cummins Inc. (NYSE:CMI) by 97.5% in the third quarter of last year, now owning 3,911 shares valued at $1.652 million. This move comes as analysts have raised price targets, with the stock holding a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average target of $588.93, following strong earnings that surpassed estimates. Cummins also announced a quarterly dividend of $2.00 per share, leading to an annualized dividend of $8.00 and a yield of approximately 1.3%.

feed.title: Bank of America Corporation $BAC Shares Bought by Axxcess Wealth Management LLC
feed.summary: Axxcess Wealth Management LLC increased its stake in Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) by 6.8% in Q3, now owning 224,711 shares valued at $11.59 million. Institutional investors collectively hold about 70.71% of the company's stock. Bank of America reported strong quarterly results, beating EPS estimates, and declared a $0.28 quarterly dividend, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a $60.30 price target.
